title: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Overview

detail.title: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: The officials of Pondicherry University have released the Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 for B.Sc Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: Pondicherry University (PU) has announced the B.Sc (Hons.) Agri./Horti. Odd Semester Time Table 2026 on 10-03-2026 for the March 2026 session. The timetable is now available for students to download from the official PU exam portal. Knowing the Time Table in advance helps students effectively plan their exam preparation.

Students can check and download the official schedule by visiting the PU portal at pondiuni.edu.in or using the direct link provided below. It is recommended to download and save the timetable PDF for easy access and future reference.

Pondicherry University has published the B.Sc (Hons.) Agri./Horti. Odd Semester Time Table on its official site for the March 2026 session. The table below highlights key details such as release date, academic session, and official link to the timetable PDF.

sections.heading: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 - Exam Dates

content.text: Pondicherry University has released the official B.Sc (Hons.) Agri./Horti. Odd Semester Time Table 2026. The following table lists the subject-wise exam dates and schedule as per the official notification.

rows: Farm Management, Production & Resource Economics Farm Power and Machinery
Farm Machinery and Power Apiculture, Sericulture and Lac Culture
Principles of Integrated Pest Management Agro-meteorology and Climate Change
Livestock and Poultry Management Temperate Fruit Crops
Introductory Nematology Diseases of Fruit, Plantation, Medicinal and Aromatic Crops & Their Management
Production Technology for Vegetables and Spices Fundamentals of Food Technology
Problematic Soils and their Management Temperate Vegetable Crops
Pests of Crops and Stored Grain and their Management
Production Technology for Fruit and Plantation Crops
Diseases of Field and Horticultural Crops and their Management-I
Manures, Fertilizers and Soil Fertility Management
System Simulation and Agro-advisory Commercial Plant Breeding Protected Cultivation

sections.heading: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Direct Download Link

content.text: Pondicherry University has activated the official PDF download link for the B.Sc (Hons.) Agri./Horti. Odd Semester Time Table 2026. Students enrolled under the March 2026 session can directly access and download their complete schedule using the link provided below.

rows: B.Sc (Hons.) Agri./Horti. Odd Semester Time Table 2026

sections.heading: How to Download Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Online?

content.text: Pondicherry University has simplified the Exam Timetable access process for B.Sc (Hons.) Agri./Horti. students. Most timetables can be downloaded without login. Follow these steps to get your Exam Timetable PDF:

items: Visit the official Pondicherry University website - pondiuni.edu.in
Go to the Examination or Academic Schedule section
Select your B.Sc (Hons.) Agri./Horti. Odd Semester from the listed schedules
Locate the correct Exam Timetable for the March 2026 session
Click to open the timetable in PDF format
Download or save the file on your device
Review the schedule carefully - verify exam dates, subject names, and time slots
